findings.title: SQL Injection via direct string concatenation in product search
findings.description: User-supplied query parameter concatenated directly into SQL LIKE clause without parameterization

findings.title: SQL Injection via category concatenation and unvalidated ORDER BY direction in query builder
findings.description: Helper function concatenates category into WHERE clause and passes unvalidated sort direction into ORDER BY via fmt.Sprintf

findings.title: SQL Injection via status filter concatenation in order listing
findings.description: Status query parameter concatenated directly into SQL string despite base query using parameterization for customer_id

findings.title: SQL Injection via loop-based tag concatenation in order listing
findings.description: Comma-separated tags parameter split and iterated in a loop, each tag interpolated into SQL LIKE clause via fmt.Sprintf without parameterization
